title: Between the Shadows BTS Psychic P.C.C.s (pp. 119–125) + Arcane Detective (pp. 126–127) — Pass A then Pass B
notes: BTS psychic P.C.C. section (New P.C.C.s, p. 119) through Psi-Mechanic (p. 125); Arcane Detective O.C.C. (pp. 126–127). Page 118 is trailing Super psionics (Dreamdance, etc.) — out of scope for this O.C.C. brief. Phased AB: composition Pass A per row, audit gate, then Pass B deep modules. Write to src/data/content/occs/nightbane/between_the_shadows.json. Link XP tables in progression/xp_tables/nightbane/between_the_shadows.json: Mind Master → between_shadows_millek_astral_mage; Kinetic / Natural & Genius / Psi-Mechanic → between_shadows_kinetic_psi_mechanic; Arcane Detective → between_shadows_arcane_detective. New spells on pp. 127–128 are a separate magic brief — Arcane Detective initial spells use existing wizard-school ids only.
